title: equisetum ramosissimum var. affine
intro: Equisetum ramosissimum var. affine, also known as the Japanese horsetail or field horsetail, is a plant species within the horsetail family (Equisetaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. Equisetum ramosissimum var. affine has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving kidney function, and supporting bone health. This plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
